advancedsearch-desc: Helitaan sahlan ee leh awoodaha raadinta sare [[Special:Search]]
advancedsearch-options-pane-preview-list: Erayada baarista ee hadda la isticmaalayo
advancedsearch-help-phrase: ;Sharaxaad :Waxay raadisaa taxane gaar ah oo xarfo ah. Calaamadaha qoraalka waa la iska indhatiraa. ;Ka digtoonow waxyaabahan soo socda :(waxay shaqaynayaan oo keliya marka la isticmaalayo calaamadaha xigashada, eeg tusaalaha hoose) :* Kala saar weedhaha raadinta adigoo isticmaalaya hakad ama firaaqo tusaale ahaan "subax wanaagsan", "saaxiib salaam!". :* Calaamadaha qoraalka iyo astaamaha kale ee aan alifbeeto ama tiro ahayn (marka laga reebo labo-dhibcoodka iyo hakadka) waa la iska indhatiri doonaa. :* Raadintu ma kala soocdo xarafka weyn iyo kan yar. :* Ereyga asalkiisa looma celinayo. ;Bogga caawinta :[https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:CirrusSearch#Words.2C_phrases.2C_and_modifiers Erayo, weedho, iyo wax-beddelayaal] ;Qaab u dhigma raadinta caadiga ah :Erayo ku jira calaamadaha xigashada, tusaale ahaan "Ka bilow bilowga".
advancedsearch-help-or: ;Sharaxaad :Ugu yaraan hal ka mid ah ereyada raadinta waa inuu ku jiraa bogga. ;Bogga caawinta :[https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:CirrusSearch#Words.2C_phrases.2C_and_modifiers Erayo, weedho, iyo wax-beddelayaal] ;Qaab u dhigma raadinta caadiga ah :Ereyo leh OR oo u dhexeeya sida Laptop AMA Notebook.
advancedsearch-help-subpageof: ;Sharaxaad :Waxay raadisaa bogag ah bog-hoosaadyo ka tirsan boggan. ;Ka digtoonow waxyaabahan soo socda :* Waxaad hal mar keliya raadin kartaa bog-hoosaadyada hal bog. :* Ha iloobin inaad dhaqaajiso namespace-yada aad rabto inaad ku xaddido raadintaada shaandhada namespace-ka. :* Ha ku darin namespace-ka hortiisa magaca bogga sidan: {{ns:project}}:Redirect. ;Bogga caawinta :[https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:CirrusSearch#subpageof Subpageof] ;Qaab u dhigma raadinta caadiga ah :subpageof: oo uu ku xigo magac bog sida subpageof:Redirect. Isticmaal labo calaamadood oo xigasho haddii bogga waalidka uu leeyahay firaaqooyin: Bogga hoose ee:"Codsiyada faallooyinka".
advancedsearch-help-hastemplate: ;Sharaxaad :Waxay raadisaa bogag ay ku jiraan si sax ah template-yadan. ;Ka digtoonow waxyaabahan soo socda :* Waxaad heli kartaa template-yo la dhexgeliyey (tusmooyin ka kooban tusmo kale). :* Shaqada soo-jeedinta tooska ah waxay heli kartaa oo keliya template-yada ku bilaabma si la mid ah raadintaada tusaale ahaan raadinta "com..." waxay soo jeedin doontaa ''"commons"'' laakiin ma soo jeedin doonto ''"nowcommons"''. ;Bogga caawinta :[https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:CirrusSearch#Hastemplate Hastemplate] ;Qaab u dhigma raadinta caadiga ah :Ereyo ku jira calaamadaha xigashada oo leh hastemplate: ka hor sida wuxuu leeyahay tusmo:"macluumaad maqan".
advancedsearch-help-filetype: ;Sharaxaad :Waxay kaliya ka raadisaa faylalka nooca la doortay. ;Ka digtoonow waxyaabahan soo socda :* Waxaad raadin kartaa oo keliya hal nooc oo fayl ah. :* Waxaad kaliya ka dooran kartaa noocyada faylka liiska hoos-u-dhaca ah. ;Bogagga caawinta :[https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:CirrusSearch#filetype Filetype] iyo [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:CirrusSearch#filemime filemime] ;Qaab u dhigma raadinta caadiga ah :Ereyo leh filetype: ka hor sida nooca faylka:ogg.
advancedsearch-help-filew: ;Sharaxaad :Goobahan waxay kuu oggolaanayaan inaad qeexdo ballaca faylka. ;Ka digtoonow waxyaabahan soo socda :* Tani waxay khuseysaa oo keliya faylasha leh ballac iyo dherer, sida fiidiyowyada iyo sawirrada. ;Bogga caawinta :[https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:CirrusSearch#File_measures Filemeasures] ;Qaab u dhigma raadinta caadiga ah :Tirooyin leh filew ka hor sida faylasha:>800.
advancedsearch-help-fileh: ;Sharaxaad :Goobahan waxay kuu oggolaanayaan inaad qeexdo dhererka faylka. ;Ka digtoonow waxyaabahan soo socda :* Tani waxay khuseysaa oo keliya faylasha leh ballac iyo dherer, sida fiidiyowyada iyo sawirrada. ;Bogga caawinta :[https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:CirrusSearch#File_measures Filemeasures] ;Qaab u dhigma raadinta caadiga ah :Tirooyin leh fileh ka hor sida fileh:>600.
advancedsearch-sort-last-edit-asc: Taariikhda wax ka beddelka – kuwii ugu da'da weyn ayaa kore
advancedsearch-sort-last-edit-desc: Taariikhda wax ka beddelka – kuwii ugu dambeeyay ayaa kore
advancedsearch-sort-create-timestamp-asc: Taariikhda abuurista – kuwii ugu da'da weyn ayaa kore
advancedsearch-sort-create-timestamp-des: Taariikhda abuurista – kuwii ugu dambeeyay ayaa kore
advancedsearch-sort-preview-last-edit-as: Kuwii ugu dambeyntii la tafatiray ugu yar
advancedsearch-sort-preview-create-times: Kuwii ugu dambeyntii la abuuray ugu yar
